VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

YAN DOES NOT PROVIDE GOOD CAUSE FOR SEEKING TO FILE A CROSS-COMPLAINT SHORTLY BEFORE TRIAL. CROSS-DEFENDANTS WOULD SUFFER PREJUDICE IF THE MOTION WAS GRANTED. MOREOVER, SOME OR ALL OF THE PROPOSED CROSS-CLAIMS APPEAR TO BE TIME-BARRED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Cross Complaint
Off Calendar Jul-13-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
CROSS-COMPLAINANT DEMAS YAN'S Motion To Amend Cross Complaint is Off calendar. The Court's Register of Actions indicates that the cross-complaint was removed to federal court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR # 5976 =(302/HEK)

MASTER CALENDAR SHORT CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-25-2012 Off Calendar

MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-05-2012 Text Ruling

Mtn To Amend X-Complt
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - TONY FU, TEL. NO. 867-5973, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. CROSS-COMPLAINANT DEMAS YAN'S Motion To Amend Cross-Complaint is Denied. Mr. Yan does not provide good cause for seeking to file a cross-complaint shortly before trial. Cross-defendants would suffer prejudice if the motion was granted. Moreover, some or all of the proposed cross-claims appear to be time-barred. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported. = (302/HEK)
